jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at BSNL
jsonLd.description:
Join the BSNL family as a Frontend Developer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BSNL:
BSNL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL!
